basic_details.job_title: VMMC & Safdarjung Hospital Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Vidyasagar Medical College & Safdarjung Hospital (VMMC & Safdarjung Hospital) Medical Officer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of VMMC & Safdarjung Hospital. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the VMMC & Safdarjung Hospital Medical Officer Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Minimum Qualification of MBBS from a recognized institution along with Medical Council registration/state council registration. Preferable: MD or equivalent qualification in Psychiatry.

selection_process: Walk-in Interview Written Exam (if more than 30 candidates to shortlist)

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the VMMC & Safdarjung Hospital recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Medical Officer. This is a contract-based position within the organization.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the Medical Officer post in the VMMC & Safdarjung Hospital recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Medical Officer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Medical Officer post will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 71,550.

faq.question: Q4. What are the essential qualifications required for the Medical Officer role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree from a recognized institution and have valid registration with the Medical Council of India or State Council. A Master's degree in Psychiatry is preferable.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview in person with all required documents.

faq.question: Q6. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview and registration for the Medical Officer post is scheduled for 12 May 2026, between 9 AM and 11 AM.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves a Walk-in Interview. If more than 30 candidates appear, a written exam may be conducted for shortlisting.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the VMMC & Safdarjung Hospital located?
faq.answer: VMMC & Safdarjung Hospital is located in New Delhi, Delhi.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should candidates carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry original documents and self-attested photocopies of ID proof, educational certificates, registration certificates, and any other relevant documents as specified in the notification.
